title: doc-surface inventory for v6 (was jssm#822)
manager: Inventory every documentation surface v6 needs — the teaching pages, references, and help-bar entries — as the bridge into the help-bar manifest. You can't build coherent docs for a language this big without first enumerating what must exist; this is the census that turns 'document v6' from a vague ambition into a checklist.
cs: bridge to the help-bar manifest (omissions D7)
